title: Magic number 11 for TPM_ALG_SHA256 in pcr_read
description: In wolftpm/src/device.rs line 115, the SHA-256 algorithm ID is passed as a bare integer literal `11` with only an inline comment, rather than using the typed constant `wolftpm_sys::TPM_ALG_ID_T_TPM_ALG_SHA256` that key.rs uses for the same purpose. This inconsistency means a reader has to look up the constant to confirm correctness, and a future refactor might miss this site. Replace with the same typed cast pattern used in key.rs.
